name: Minimal Example Framework
synopsis: Smallest valid framework file. Demonstrates every required field at its minimum form. Not a useful framework, just a structural reference.

core_principles.principle: A valid framework has all five layers.
core_principles.description: Even if a layer carries only a single entry, the key must be present so that ingesters can rely on it.

primary_multipliers.name: Structural predictability
primary_multipliers.mechanism: Every valid framework file looks the same at the top level, so tools never need heuristics.

required: You need a template to start a new framework.

exit_conditions: The new framework validates against the spec.
